comment_cc: "As proposed by Sala et al. (2020), the uncertainty upper limit is 128% of the min SOS as in the original Planetary boundaries framework (Rockstrom et al., 2009)"
comment_global nf: "Global normalization factors are for the year 2010 (Andreasi et al., 2023)"
